text: A permit-to-work (PTW) system is highly necessary on board a vessel for:

options.text: Ensuring the occupational safety of working personnel
Ensuring the quality and structural integrity of the work executed
Ensuring proper tool and resource utilization

explanation: A Permit to Work (PTW) is a formal document designed to ensure that high-risk tasks are thoroughly assessed, hazards are identified, and control measures are implemented to protect personnel and the vessel's integrity during maintenance or repair activities.
